archimate:Representation.name: N3
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: N3 is a serialization format for representing RDF (Resource Description Framework) data. It is an extension of Turtle (Terse RDF Triple Language) and provides additional features for expressing rules, formulas, and logical statements within RDF graphs. N3 aims to provide a more expressive and flexible syntax for representing RDF data compared to other serialization formats.
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/TeamSubmission/n3/
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/N3Representation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/N3Representation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: N3 is a serialization format for representing RDF (Resource Description Framework) data. It is an extension of Turtle (Terse RDF Triple Language) and provides additional features for expressing rules, formulas, and logical statements within RDF graphs. N3 aims to provide a more expressive and flexible syntax for representing RDF data compared to other serialization formats.
